articles.title: Hormuz disruptions: India’s crude oil imports from Russia remain near all-time high in July despite no sanctions waiver from US
articles.summary: Industry experts say India's crude procurement pattern during the US-Iran conflict reflects a flexible and well-diversified sourcing strategy. India’s crude oil imports from Russia in July so far have averaged at around 2.45 million barrels per day.

articles.title: DGCA's new eGCA platform aims to make aviation incident reporting faster
articles.summary: The DGCA is developing a digital platform for faster aviation incident reporting. This initiative aims to enhance the country's aviation safety oversight capabilities. Airfare pricing is determined by dynamic supply and demand forces.

articles.title: US stock market today: Wall Street back in green; AI-related, chipmaker stocks rebound
articles.summary: The S&P 500 advanced 0.6%, following its first weekly loss in three weeks and only its third weekly decline since the end of March. Nvidia rose 1.9%, helping lift the broader market after being the biggest drag on the S&P 500 during Friday's session.

articles.title: Despite Trump-Xi agreement, China’s rare earth magnet exports to US remain 20% below pre-trade war levels
articles.summary: China's commitment to maintain supplies of critical materials, including rare-earth magnets, formed a central element of the October agreement under which Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping agreed to pause the trade war.

articles.title: Behind the reduction in workforce in India’s top three private sector banks
articles.summary: At ICICI Bank, the country’s second largest lender, total number of employees have come down by around 6,633 to 1,24,324 in FY26, from 1,30,957 employees a year earlier, the annual report.

articles.title: Midnight munchies to 1am cravings: Here's what India ordered during the FIFA World Cup 2026 final
articles.summary: While major cities remained active, some of the sharpest spikes in orders came from smaller football-loving towns. Hosur recorded the highest increase in finals-night orders, with demand jumping 41.9% over a regular weekend.

articles.title: Justin Bieber and Shakira aren't getting paid for the World Cup final — here's why they said yes anyway
articles.summary: Justin Bieber, Shakira and Post Malone won't be paid to perform at the 2026 World Cup final — just like the Super Bowl. Here's why a billion-person audience is worth more than any fee.

articles.title: Blame it on the IndiGo fiasco? Air ticket refund complaints up 233% in 2025
articles.summary: The number of refund-related complaints reported by airlines stood at more than 4,300 in 2025, the highest in the past four years.

articles.title: Messi in tears after World Cup final loss: Will he come back for 2030? Here's what we know
articles.summary: Spain beat Argentina 1-0 AET in the 2026 World Cup final as Messi cried at full-time. He finished with 8 goals and 4 assists but has not ruled out the 2030 World Cup. Here's everything.

articles.title: 2026 Mahindra Scorpio N facelift: Bigger screen, digital cluster and panoramic sunroof incoming
articles.summary: The 2026 Mahindra Scorpio N facelift is expected to bring a 10.25-inch screen, digital cluster, panoramic sunroof and 360-degree camera — while retaining its turbo petrol and diesel engines.

articles.title: Mahindra Vision S launch expected soon — here's everything spotted on the Vision S so far
articles.summary: Mahindra Vision S — the 'Baby Scorpio' — is expected to launch soon with a 12.3-inch screen, ADAS, turbo-petrol and diesel engines. Here's everything from spy shots and features revealed so far.

articles.title: Is the FIFA World Cup trophy real gold? Here's everything about football's most valuable prize
articles.summary: The FIFA World Cup trophy contains 4.93 kg of 18-karat gold and is worth an estimated $20 million in cultural value. The winners don't keep it — here's everything about football's greatest prize.

articles.title: US fuel prices rise: Gasoline returns to $4 per gallon after Middle East flare-up
articles.summary: Average petrol prices in the United States have now reached four dollars per gallon. This increase follows recent flare-ups and rising tensions in the Middle East region. Motorists in several states have been paying more than four dollars for some time.

articles.title: From Kasautii to Kandivali: Inside Shweta Tiwari's lavish life and impressive fortune
articles.summary: Shweta Tiwari's net worth is estimated at ₹81–90 crore, with ₹3 lakh per episode fees, a BMW and Audi in her garage, and a stylish Kandivali home. Here's how India's TV star built her fortune.

articles.title: Era of cheap borrowing may be over as world enters 'a new macro regime': Moody's
articles.summary: The era of ultra-low interest rates is ending, ushering in higher borrowing costs. Investors anticipate sustained investment in artificial intelligence and infrastructure projects. Geopolitical risks are also expected to remain elevated in the coming years.

articles.title: Nifty500 Ahimsa: NSE Indices launches new thematic index for exposure to companies aligned with non-violence principles - how it works
articles.summary: The index draws its constituents from the broad-based Nifty 500 universe, enabling diversified sectoral representation while giving preference to companies whose business practices exhibit a stronger commitment to responsible and sustainable principles.

articles.title: ₹80 lakh for a matchbox-sized flat? Noida man's viral video sparks housing price debate
articles.summary: The video, which has been widely shared across social media platforms, shows the man reacting to what he describes as a tiny apartment priced at nearly ₹80 lakh, sarcastically calling it a "matchbox-sized flat"

articles.title: Saudi Arabia overhauls domestic worker residency rules, ends rigid multi-year upfront fees
articles.summary: In a coordinated digital rollout, the kingdom transitioned from enforcing mandatory one- or two-year residency renewals to giving employers the power to renew permits for just three months at a time.

articles.title: Indigenous bullet train, inter-operable signalling system: What’s happening on India’s first high-speed rail project
articles.summary: India is planning to begin trials of its domestically developed bullet trains by the middle of 2027. Civil construction on the 97-km Surat-Vapi high-speed rail stretch is scheduled to be completed this year.

articles.title: Christopher Nolan’s red carpet look turns attention to India’s ajrakh heritage at NY Odyssey premiere
articles.summary: For the artisans who preserve these centuries-old techniques and the textile businesses supporting them, such international exposure functions as invaluable soft-power publicity.

articles.title: After cars, now ethanol may make its way to your kitchen: Plans in the works to introduce it as mainstream cooking fuel alongside LPG
articles.summary: As part of the proposed framework, the government is expected to examine subsidy mechanisms and measures to develop the necessary supply chain for wider adoption of ethanol.

articles.title: Stocks to buy: What's the outlook for Nifty for July 20-July 24 week? Check list of top stock recommendations
articles.summary: Stock market recommendations: Bharat Forge, and Bajaj Finance - these are the top stocks to buy that Sudeep Shah, Head - Technical Research and Derivatives, SBI Securities has recommended for the July 20-July 24, 2026 week.

articles.title: Gold price prediction today: Why are gold prices under pressure? Check outlook for July 20, 2026 week
articles.summary: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices continue to trade on a weak note as geopolitical developments keep investors wary, says Manav Modi, Senior Analyst, Commodity Research at Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd.

articles.title: RTI response reveals Rajya Sabha MPs’ expenses crossed ₹262 cr in two years; travel and allowances lead
articles.summary: More than Rs 151 crore spent on allowances and travel alone signals where the bulk of funds are going, raising questions about necessity, oversight and the return on taxpayer investment

articles.title: Dining out? Don’t pay service charge! Minister Pralhad Joshi warns restaurants against violations; Check rules here
articles.summary: The action follows complaints received through the National Consumer Helpline (NCH), backed by invoices showing mandatory service charges being added automatically

articles.title: Delhi Police imposes 'section 163' ahead of CJP’s 'Chalo Sansad' parliament march
articles.summary: Delhi is on alert as police tighten restrictions ahead of the planned CJP march to Parliament, setting the stage for a tense political confrontation.

articles.title: US Justice Department drops Adani bribery case after intensive legal push
articles.summary: The US Justice Department has dropped the high-profile bribery case against Gautam Adani after a rigorous legal defence and expert analyses highlighted jurisdictional and evidentiary challenges

articles.title: Naveen Jindal Group in talks for proposed nuclear projects, in discussion with US, French companies
articles.summary: The steel-to-ports conglomerate plans to develop around 18 GW of nuclear power capacity across multiple states.

articles.title: Rupee tumbles 12 paise against US dollar as Middle East tensions lift crude prices
articles.summary: The Indian Rupee opened lower against the US dollar on Monday. Rising crude oil prices and Middle East tensions fueled dollar demand. Foreign capital outflows from equity markets also weakened the local currency.

articles.title: US import prices up 7.1% in June, highest annual gain since August 2022
articles.summary: United States import prices saw an unexpected rise in June. Nonfuel import costs increased, offsetting lower fuel prices during the month. Industrial supplies and materials became more expensive, driven by chemicals and finished nonmetals.

articles.title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for July 20, 2026 week - check list
articles.summary: Stock market recommendations: Saatvik Green Energy, and Unimech Aerospace - Motilal Oswal Wealth Management Research Desk has picked these as the top stocks to buy for the week starting July 20, 2026:

Quote of the Day by Gautam Adani: ‘I analyse in my own way...’
articles.summary: This assertion highlights his approach of aligning the Adani Group’s portfolio with India's infrastructure, energy, and development goals, emphasising long-term growth in sectors prioritised by the government.

articles.title: Oil prices jump 3% as US-Iran conflict intensifies, Brent crude tops $90 per barrel
articles.summary: Oil prices climbed significantly as United States and Iran conflict intensified. Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz faced increasing pressure and disruptions. US military actions continued for a ninth consecutive night against Iran.

articles.title: More brands in store, but price cuts may lag
articles.summary: New British brands are expected to enter Indian markets, offering consumers more retail choices. While duty cuts are beneficial, rupee depreciation may limit immediate price reductions. Some brands are pausing price hikes and reducing costs on specific product categories.

articles.title: Meet Amitabh Bachchan's former CA, who built a ₹28,000 crore pharma giant
articles.summary: Godha began his professional practice in 1971. Within a few years, he was handling the personal finances, taxation, and investments of Bollywood superstar Amitabh Bachchan and his family.
